ast.name: createEl
ast.source: hr
ast.target: hr

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reinitializing or Reloading may cause disabled plugins to disappear; close and open the menu to see them again.
ast.target: 重新初始化或重新加载可能会导致已禁用的插件消失；关闭并重新打开菜单以再次看到它们。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This is not usually necessary. If you have "Debug startup time" enabled in the Community Plugins tab you'll see startup times when using commmands
ast.target: 这通常不是必需的。如果您在“社区插件”选项卡中启用了“调试启动时间”，您将在使用命令时看到启动时间

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If this is off, DAC will only match plugins by their ID
ast.target: 如果关闭，DAC 将仅通过插件 ID 进行匹配

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Exclude plugins using regex (case insensitive).
Each new line is a new regex. Plugin ids are used for matching by default. Included plugins are on the left, excluded on the right.
ast.target: 使用正则表达式排除插件（不区分大小写）。\n每行是一个新的正则表达式。默认情况下使用插件 ID 进行匹配。包含的插件在左侧，排除的在右侧。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Exclude snippets using regex (case insensitive).
Each new line is a new regex. Snippet are only exclude by their name.
ast.target: 使用正则表达式排除代码片段（不区分大小写）。\n每行是一个新的正则表达式。代码片段仅通过其名称排除。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Warning
ast.target: 警告

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Reinitialize Obsidian after plugin changes
ast.target: 插件更改后重新初始化 Obsidian

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Reload Obsidian after plugin changes
ast.target: 插件更改后重新加载 Obsidian

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Changes below affect filtering and bisect candidate selection.
ast.target: 以下更改会影响过滤和二分候选选择。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use Filters on Plugin Display Names
ast.target: 对插件显示名称使用过滤器

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use Filters on Plugin Authors
ast.target: 对插件作者使用过滤器

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use Filters on Plugin Descriptions
ast.target: 对插件描述使用过滤器

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Plugin Exclusions
ast.target: 插件排除项

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Snippet Exclusions
ast.target: 代码片段排除项

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Start bisect before answering.
ast.target: 在回答前开始二分。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No alternate group left to test. Bisect stopped.
ast.target: 没有剩余的备用组可供测试。二分已停止。

ast.name: heading
ast.source: Installed plugins
ast.target: 已安装的插件

ast.name: heading
ast.source: CSS snippets
ast.target: CSS 代码片段

ast.name: name
ast.source: Plugin Enable All - enable every installed plugin
ast.target: 启用所有插件 - 启用所有已安装的插件

ast.name: name
ast.source: Plugin Bisect Start - begin troubleshooting by splitting plugins in half
ast.target: 开始插件二分 - 通过将插件分成两半开始故障排除

ast.name: name
ast.source: Plugin Bisect Yes - issue still happens with the currently enabled plugins
ast.target: 插件二分是 - 问题在当前启用的插件中仍然发生

ast.name: name
ast.source: Plugin Bisect No - issue does not happen with the currently enabled plugins
ast.target: 插件二分否 - 问题在当前启用的插件中未发生

ast.name: name
ast.source: Snippet Bisect Start - begin troubleshooting by splitting CSS snippets in half
ast.target: 开始代码片段二分 - 通过将 CSS 代码片段分成两半开始故障排除

ast.name: name
ast.source: Snippet Bisect Yes - issue still happens with the currently enabled CSS snippets
ast.target: 代码片段二分是 - 问题在当前启用的 CSS 代码片段中仍然发生

ast.name: name
ast.source: Snippet Bisect No - issue does not happen with the currently enabled CSS snippets
ast.target: 代码片段二分否 - 问题在当前启用的 CSS 代码片段中未发生

ast.name: name
ast.source: Snippet Enable All - enable every installed CSS snippet
ast.target: 启用所有代码片段 - 启用所有已安装的 CSS 代码片段

ast.source:
^daily/
\\.png$
etc...

ast.source: Enable all items
ast.target: 启用所有项目

ast.name: tooltip
ast.source: Start bisect

ast.name: tooltip
ast.source: Issue still happens
ast.target: 问题仍然发生

ast.name: tooltip
